title: helianthus annuus var. debilis
intro: Helianthus annuus var. debilis, also known as annual sunflower or Asian sunflower, is a subspecies of the common sunflower (Helianthus annuus) that is native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthus annuus var. debilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and dried flower extracts, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
